entries.source: A capable learning companion should not depend on geography, family income, or whether a learner already knows the right person to ask.

entries.source: A learner base that already extends beyond India into a wider international audience.
entries.value: Msingi wa wanafunzi ambao tayari umevuka India na kufikia hadhira pana ya kimataifa.

entries.source: A learner can open Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, Math Step Coach, quizzes, or flashcards directly in guest mode from the public learning modes directory.
entries.value: Mwanafunzi anaweza kufungua Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, Math Step Coach, maswali, au flashcards moja kwa moja katika hali ya mgeni kutoka kwenye saraka ya hali za umma za kujifunza.

entries.source: Access can be funded by partner schools or supported through CSR sponsorship paths for communities that need subsidised AI learning.

entries.source: After the inspir.app domain was sold to fund continued free access, the live product moved to inspirlearning.com.

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different interaction shapes, so inspir uses active, mode-specific teaching. A homework hint, Socratic question, historical simulation, flashcard review, and writing critique should not behave like the same generic chat.
entries.value: Kazi tofauti za kujifunza zinahitaji miundo tofauti ya mwingiliano, kwa hiyo inspir hutumia ufundishaji hai na maalum kwa kila hali. Kidokezo cha kazi za nyumbani, swali la Kisokrati, uigaji wa kihistoria, marudio ya flashcard, na ukosoaji wa uandishi havipaswi kutenda kama gumzo lilelile la jumla.

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different shapes: Socratic questions, homework hints, flashcards, debate, history roleplay, writing critique, and study planning.
entries.value: Kazi tofauti za kujifunza zinahitaji maumbo tofauti: maswali ya Kisokrati, vidokezo vya kazi za nyumbani, flashcards, mjadala, uigizaji wa historia, ukosoaji wa uandishi, na kupanga masomo.

entries.source: Discovery is open where the content is public.
entries.value: Ugunduzi uko wazi pale maudhui ni ya umma.

entries.source: Each learning mode has a public URL so learners can arrive from search directly inside the right learning experience.
entries.value: Kila hali ya kujifunza ina URL ya umma ili wanafunzi waweze kufika kutoka utafutaji moja kwa moja ndani ya uzoefu sahihi wa kujifunza.

entries.source: Evaluate a public AI learning layer first, then explore custom workflows, confidentiality needs, content alignment, and usage funding.
entries.value: Tathmini kwanza tabaka la umma la kujifunza kwa AI, kisha chunguza mitiririko maalum, mahitaji ya usiri, ulinganishaji wa maudhui, na ufadhili wa matumizi.

entries.source: Every core learning mode has a public guest entrypoint so people can start from search, social, or a shared link.
entries.value: Kila hali kuu ya kujifunza ina njia ya umma ya kuingia kama mgeni ili watu waanze kutoka utafutaji, mitandao ya kijamii, au kiungo kilichoshirikiwa.

entries.value: Kila gumzo la kujifunza la mgeni linaloweza kuorodheshwa, limepangwa kwa tabia ya kufundisha na hitaji la kujifunza.

entries.source: How inspir handles public guest learning pages, private saved chats, crawler access, learner safety, and school trust.
entries.value: Jinsi inspir inavyoshughulikia kurasa za umma za kujifunza kwa wageni, gumzo binafsi zilizohifadhiwa, ufikiaji wa vitambazaji, usalama wa wanafunzi, na uaminifu wa shule.

entries.source: How is inspir different from a generic AI chatbot?
entries.value: inspir inatofautianaje na chatbot ya AI ya kawaida?

entries.source: How is this different from giving students a generic AI chatbot?
entries.value: Hii inatofautianaje na kuwapa wanafunzi chatbot ya AI ya jumla?

entries.source: How public guest learning can extend into school-specific AI learning spaces.
entries.value: Jinsi kujifunza kwa umma kama mgeni kunavyoweza kupanuka kuwa nafasi maalum za kujifunza kwa AI za shule.

entries.source: Identify the school goals that matter most: conceptual support, homework hints, exam prep, active recall, writing feedback, or enrichment.
entries.value: Tambua malengo ya shule yaliyo muhimu zaidi: msaada wa dhana, vidokezo vya kazi za nyumbani, maandalizi ya mtihani, kukumbuka kwa bidii, mrejesho wa uandishi, au uongezaji maarifa.

entries.source: inspir began in 2013 as a public quiz and learning community, grew through schools and student networks, and later developed AI learning infrastructure and public AI tutoring experiences.
entries.value: inspir ilianza mwaka 2013 kama jamii ya umma ya maswali na kujifunza, ikakua kupitia shule na mitandao ya wanafunzi, na baadaye ikaendeleza miundombinu ya kujifunza kwa AI na uzoefu wa umma wa ufundishaji kwa AI.

entries.source: inspir crawler and indexing policy
entries.value: Sera ya vitambazaji na kuorodhesha ya inspir

entries.source: inspir exists to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for anyone with curiosity through free public AI learning tools and school-ready learning spaces.
entries.value: inspir ipo ili kufanya kujifunza kupatikane, kuvutie, kufurahishe, na kuwa na manufaa kwa yeyote mwenye udadisi kupitia zana za umma za kujifunza kwa AI bila malipo na nafasi za kujifunza zilizo tayari kwa shule.

entries.source: inspir is a free AI learning platform with public guest modes for explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, roleplay, writing feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir ni jukwaa la kujifunza kwa AI bila malipo lenye hali za umma za wageni kwa maelezo, ufundishaji wa Kisokrati, kocha wa kazi za nyumbani, maswali, flashcards, mjadala, uigizaji wa majukumu, mrejesho wa uandishi, na kupanga masomo.

entries.source: inspir is a free AI learning platform with public guest modes for explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, writing feedback, coding help, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir ni jukwaa la kujifunza kwa AI bila malipo lenye hali za umma za wageni kwa maelezo, ufundishaji wa Kisokrati, kocha wa kazi za nyumbani, maswali, flashcards, mjadala, mrejesho wa uandishi, msaada wa usimbaji, na kupanga masomo.

entries.source: inspir is designed around reasoning, practice, recall, and explanation instead of handing learners finished work.
entries.value: inspir imeundwa kuzunguka hoja, mazoezi, kukumbuka, na maelezo badala ya kuwapa wanafunzi kazi iliyokamilika.

entries.source: inspir is organized around hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, debate, review, and explanation instead of passive answer-copying.
entries.value: inspir imepangwa kuzunguka vidokezo, maswali, majaribio, flashcards, mjadala, marudio, na maelezo badala ya kunakili majibu bila kushiriki.

entries.source: inspir is organized around learning modes such as Socratic tutoring, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, maths steps, writing critique, and exam planning, so students land in a more focused learning behavior.
entries.value: inspir imepangwa kuzunguka hali za kujifunza kama ufundishaji wa Kisokrati, vidokezo vya kazi za nyumbani, maswali, flashcards, hatua za hisabati, ukosoaji wa uandishi, na kupanga mitihani, ili wanafunzi watue katika tabia ya kujifunza iliyo na lengo zaidi.

entries.source: inspir makes learning modes public and indexable at /chat/{topicSlug}, letting learners land directly inside the right AI learning experience without needing a saved private chat.
entries.value: inspir hufanya hali za kujifunza ziwe za umma na ziweze kuorodheshwa katika /chat/{topicSlug}, na kuwaruhusu wanafunzi kutua moja kwa moja ndani ya uzoefu sahihi wa kujifunza kwa AI bila kuhitaji gumzo binafsi lililohifadhiwa.

entries.source: inspir organizes AI around active learning behaviors: hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, critique, and review.
entries.value: inspir hupanga AI kuzunguka tabia hai za kujifunza: vidokezo, maswali, majaribio, flashcards, ukosoaji, na marudio.

entries.source: inspir organizes AI around learning modes with specific teaching behavior: explanations, Socratic questions, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, debate, roleplay, writing feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir hupanga AI kuzunguka hali za kujifunza zenye tabia mahususi ya kufundisha: maelezo, maswali ya Kisokrati, vidokezo vya kazi za nyumbani, maswali, flashcards, mjadala, uigizaji wa majukumu, mrejesho wa uandishi, na kupanga masomo.

entries.source: inspir public trust safeguards
entries.value: ulinzi wa uaminifu wa umma wa inspir

entries.source: inspir separates public guest learning pages from private saved conversations, so learners, schools, search engines, and AI answer engines can understand what is meant to be public.
entries.value: inspir hutenganisha kurasa za umma za kujifunza kwa wageni na mazungumzo binafsi yaliyohifadhiwa, ili wanafunzi, shule, injini za utafutaji, na injini za majibu za AI zielewe kilichokusudiwa kuwa cha umma.

entries.source: inspir started as a Facebook page publishing quizzes and building a habit of extracurricular learning.
entries.value: inspir ilianza kama ukurasa wa Facebook uliokuwa ukichapisha maswali na kujenga tabia ya kujifunza nje ya masomo.

entries.source: inspir supports search and AI retrieval for public learning pages. Training crawlers and private or operational surfaces are treated differently.
entries.value: inspir huunga mkono utafutaji na urejeshaji wa AI kwa kurasa za umma za kujifunza. Vitambazaji vya mafunzo na sehemu binafsi au za kiutendaji hushughulikiwa tofauti.

entries.source: inspir trust principles

entries.source: inspir trust reference links
entries.value: viungo vya marejeleo ya uaminifu ya inspir

entries.source: inspir went live as a consumer-facing AI learning product within weeks of ChatGPT's public release.
entries.value: inspir ilienda hewani kama bidhaa ya kujifunza kwa AI inayowalenga watumiaji ndani ya wiki chache baada ya ChatGPT kutolewa kwa umma.

entries.source: inspir.uk next-generation buildout
entries.value: ujenzi wa kizazi kijacho wa inspir.uk

entries.source: Journalists, directory editors, partners, schools, AI answer engines, and anyone writing about inspir can use it for facts, links, story angles, and citation-friendly references.
entries.value: Waandishi wa habari, wahariri wa saraka, washirika, shule, injini za majibu za AI, na yeyote anayeandika kuhusu inspir wanaweza kuitumia kwa taarifa, viungo, mitazamo ya hadithi, na marejeleo rafiki kwa kunukuu.

entries.source: No. Private saved chats use private identifiers, are not listed in the sitemap, and are not included in AI discovery files such as llms.txt, llms-full.txt, or ai-content-index.json.

entries.source: Public guest modes give anyone a useful place to start, while school and partner deployments can adapt the experience for local needs.
entries.value: Hali za umma za wageni humpa yeyote mahali pazuri pa kuanzia, huku usambazaji wa shule na washirika ukiweza kubadilisha uzoefu kulingana na mahitaji ya eneo.

entries.source: Public guest-mode URLs exist so learners can land directly in useful learning modes from search, social links, schools, and AI answer engines.
entries.value: URL za hali ya umma ya mgeni zipo ili wanafunzi watue moja kwa moja katika hali za kujifunza zenye manufaa kutoka utafutaji, viungo vya kijamii, shule, na injini za majibu za AI.

entries.source: Public learning should be discoverable without making private chats public.
entries.value: Kujifunza kwa umma kunapaswa kugundulika bila kufanya gumzo binafsi ziwe za umma.

entries.source: Public pages are open to search and AI retrieval crawlers, while admin tools, API routes, reset flows, and private utilities are disallowed.
entries.value: Kurasa za umma ziko wazi kwa vitambazaji vya utafutaji na urejeshaji wa AI, huku zana za admin, njia za API, mitiririko ya reset, na huduma binafsi zikizuiwa.

entries.source: Public pages, topic chats, learning paths, blog guides, and authority pages are intended to be discoverable.
entries.value: Kurasa za umma, gumzo za mada, njia za kujifunza, miongozo ya blogu, na kurasa za mamlaka zimekusudiwa kugundulika.

entries.source: Reference links, public facts, press context, and citation-friendly details.
entries.value: Viungo vya marejeleo, taarifa za umma, muktadha wa vyombo vya habari, na maelezo rafiki kwa kunukuu.

entries.source: Robots policy
entries.value: Sera ya roboti

entries.source: Robots rules allow Google, standard search crawlers, and major AI discovery crawlers on public pages, while blocking API routes, admin routes, and reset flows.
entries.value: Sheria za roboti huruhusu Google, vitambazaji vya kawaida vya utafutaji, na vitambazaji vikubwa vya ugunduzi wa AI kwenye kurasa za umma, huku zikizuia njia za API, njia za admin, na mitiririko ya reset.

entries.source: Safeguards
entries.value: Ulinzi

entries.source: Saved user conversations use private identifiers, are not included in the sitemap or AI discovery files, and should not be treated as public source material.
entries.value: Mazungumzo ya watumiaji yaliyohifadhiwa hutumia vitambulisho binafsi, hayajajumuishwa kwenye sitemap au faili za ugunduzi wa AI, na hayapaswi kuchukuliwa kama nyenzo chanzo ya umma.

entries.source: School and CSR pathways for funded access
entries.value: Njia za shule na CSR kwa ufikiaji unaofadhiliwa

entries.source: School and partner pathway
entries.value: Njia ya shule na washirika

entries.source: School angle
entries.value: Mtazamo wa shule

entries.source: School deployment pathway
entries.value: Njia ya usambazaji wa shule

entries.source: School deployments can be adapted around custom content, workflows, prompts, and NCERT-aligned learning needs where appropriate.
entries.value: Usambazaji wa shule unaweza kubadilishwa kuzunguka maudhui maalum, mitiririko ya kazi, vidokezo, na mahitaji ya kujifunza yanayolingana na NCERT pale inapofaa.

entries.source: School leaders
entries.value: Viongozi wa shule

entries.source: School rollouts can be planned around student privacy, staff oversight, and the practical boundaries a learning community needs.
entries.value: Uzinduzi wa shule unaweza kupangwa kuzunguka faragha ya wanafunzi, usimamizi wa wafanyakazi, na mipaka ya vitendo ambayo jamii ya kujifunza inahitaji.

entries.source: Schools and CSR partners
entries.value: Shule na washirika wa CSR

entries.source: Schools and partners
entries.value: Shule na washirika

entries.source: Schools and partners can build from the public product toward tailored, confidential, and subsidized deployments.
entries.value: Shule na washirika wanaweza kujenga kutoka bidhaa ya umma kuelekea usambazaji uliorekebishwa, wa siri, na wenye ruzuku.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate inspir through public guest modes first, then explore tailored AI learning spaces with custom workflows, confidentiality planning, curriculum needs, and funded access paths.
entries.value: Shule zinaweza kutathmini inspir kwanza kupitia hali za umma za wageni, kisha kuchunguza nafasi maalum za kujifunza kwa AI zenye mitiririko maalum, kupanga usiri, mahitaji ya mtaala, na njia za ufikiaji unaofadhiliwa.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate public modes first, then discuss tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, content needs, and funded access.
entries.value: Shule zinaweza kutathmini hali za umma kwanza, kisha kujadili mitiririko maalum, kupanga usiri, mahitaji ya maudhui, na ufikiaji unaofadhiliwa.

entries.source: Schools can test public guest modes first, then use the schools page to explore tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, NCERT-aligned options, and funded access.
entries.value: Shule zinaweza kujaribu hali za umma za wageni kwanza, kisha kutumia ukurasa wa shule kuchunguza mitiririko maalum, kupanga usiri, chaguo zinazolingana na NCERT, na ufikiaji unaofadhiliwa.

entries.source: Search visibility has boundaries
entries.value: Mwonekano wa utafutaji una mipaka

entries.source: Short description
entries.value: Maelezo mafupi

entries.source: Start directly in the right learning mode for homework hints, maths steps, writing critique, quizzes, flashcards, or exam planning.
entries.value: Anza moja kwa moja kwenye hali sahihi ya kujifunza kwa vidokezo vya kazi za nyumbani, hatua za hisabati, uhakiki wa uandishi, maswali, flashcards, au kupanga maandalizi ya mtihani.

entries.source: Start from a public learning mode with clear boundaries.
entries.value: Anza na hali ya umma ya kujifunza yenye mipaka iliyo wazi.

entries.source: Start learning
entries.value: Anza kujifunza

entries.source: Students
entries.value: Wanafunzi

entries.source: Study workflows that connect guest modes, prompts, practice, and related guides.
entries.value: Mitiririko ya kusoma inayounganisha hali za wageni, vidokezo, mazoezi, na miongozo inayohusiana.

entries.source: Support funded AI learning access for communities that need high-quality support without adding cost to families.
entries.value: Saidia ufikiaji wa kujifunza kwa AI unaofadhiliwa kwa jamii zinazohitaji msaada wa ubora bila kuongeza gharama kwa familia.

entries.source: Syndicated coverage for wider consumer reach.
entries.value: Matangazo yaliyosambazwa kwa ufikiaji mpana zaidi wa watumiaji.

entries.source: Teachers
entries.value: Walimu

entries.source: Teachers and leaders can start with Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards before a formal rollout.
entries.value: Walimu na viongozi wanaweza kuanza na Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, maswali, na flashcards kabla ya uzinduzi rasmi.

entries.source: Terms
entries.value: Masharti

entries.source: Text-first discovery file for AI answer engines, assistants, educators, and citation tools.
entries.value: Faili ya ugunduzi inayotanguliza maandishi kwa injini za majibu za AI, wasaidizi, waelimishaji, na zana za nukuu.

entries.source: The app is organized around teaching behaviors such as Socratic questioning, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, roleplay, and planning.
entries.value: Programu imepangwa kuzunguka tabia za kufundisha kama kuuliza maswali ya Kisokrati, vidokezo vya kazi za nyumbani, maswali, flashcards, uigizaji wa majukumu, na kupanga.

entries.source: The community expanded through schools, universities, competitions, extracurricular programmes, and learner communities.
entries.value: Jamii ilipanuka kupitia shule, vyuo vikuu, mashindano, programu za ziada, na jamii za wanafunzi.

entries.source: The formal privacy page for data use, rights, and public service conditions.
entries.value: Ukurasa rasmi wa faragha kuhusu matumizi ya data, haki, na masharti ya huduma ya umma.

entries.source: The formal terms covering acceptable use, account responsibilities, and service conditions.
entries.value: Masharti rasmi yanayohusu matumizi yanayokubalika, wajibu wa akaunti, na masharti ya huduma.

entries.source: The goal is discovery and citation of public learning pages. Public routes, guides, and learning hubs are open to major AI search, retrieval, and assistant crawlers, while API, admin, reset, and private utility routes stay disallowed.
entries.value: Lengo ni ugunduzi na unukuu wa kurasa za umma za kujifunza. Njia za umma, miongozo, na vituo vya kujifunza viko wazi kwa utafutaji mkubwa wa AI, urejeshaji, na vitambazaji vya wasaidizi, huku API, admin, reset, na njia binafsi za matumizi zikibaki zimezuiwa.

entries.source: The live robots rules used by search crawlers and AI retrieval systems.
entries.value: Kanuni hai za robots zinazotumiwa na vitambazaji vya utafutaji na mifumo ya urejeshaji ya AI.

entries.source: The live, crawlable learning surface that turns the mission into product behavior.
entries.value: Uso hai na unaoweza kutambazwa wa kujifunza unaogeuza dhamira kuwa tabia ya bidhaa.

entries.source: The next phase is open-source, contributor-friendly, and connected to the wider international buildout at inspir.uk.
entries.value: Awamu inayofuata ni open-source, rafiki kwa wachangiaji, na imeunganishwa na ujenzi mpana wa kimataifa katika inspir.uk.

entries.source: The open-source rebuild for developers, educators, and contributors.
entries.value: Ujenzi upya wa open-source kwa wasanidi, waelimishaji, na wachangiaji.

entries.source: The platform worked on curriculum ingestion, retrieval, structured learning flows, and early AI tutoring experiences.
entries.value: Jukwaa lilifanya kazi kwenye uingizaji wa mtaala, urejeshaji, mitiririko iliyopangwa ya kujifunza, na uzoefu wa mapema wa ufundishaji wa AI.

entries.source: The practical trust layer behind guest mode.
entries.value: Safu ya vitendo ya uaminifu nyuma ya hali ya mgeni.

entries.source: The public blog contains more than 100 guides, prompt loops, and pillar clusters connected to live learning modes.
entries.value: Blogu ya umma ina zaidi ya miongozo 100, mizunguko ya vidokezo, na makundi ya nguzo yaliyounganishwa na hali hai za kujifunza.

entries.source: The public explanation of why inspir exists and why learning access matters.
entries.value: Maelezo ya umma ya kwa nini inspir ipo na kwa nini ufikiaji wa kujifunza ni muhimu.

entries.source: The public modes are designed around learning behavior: hints, Socratic questions, step checks, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, review loops, and active explanation.
entries.value: Hali za umma zimeundwa kuzunguka tabia za kujifunza: vidokezo, maswali ya Kisokrati, ukaguzi wa hatua, maswali, flashcards, mrejesho wa uandishi, mizunguko ya marudio, na kujieleza kikamilifu.

entries.source: The public product is easy to try first, while schools and partners can explore tailored deployments for community needs.
entries.value: Bidhaa ya umma ni rahisi kujaribu kwanza, huku shule na washirika wakiweza kuchunguza usambazaji maalum kwa mahitaji ya jamii.

entries.source: The public product keeps learning easy to try, while schools and CSR partners can support tailored deployments when communities need confidentiality, curriculum alignment, or funded access.
entries.value: Bidhaa ya umma hufanya kujifunza kubaki rahisi kujaribu, huku shule na washirika wa CSR wakiweza kusaidia usambazaji maalum jamii zinapohitaji usiri, ulinganifu wa mtaala, au ufikiaji unaofadhiliwa.

entries.source: The public statement of why inspir exists and what learning access means.
entries.value: Tamko la umma la kwa nini inspir ipo na maana ya ufikiaji wa kujifunza.

entries.source: The school pathway for tailored AI learning spaces and funded access.
entries.value: Njia ya shule kwa nafasi maalum za kujifunza kwa AI na ufikiaji unaofadhiliwa.

entries.source: The SEO system is designed to make useful public learning resources findable while keeping private user material, admin surfaces, and utility routes outside discovery.
entries.value: Mfumo wa SEO umeundwa kufanya rasilimali za umma za kujifunza zenye manufaa zipatikane huku nyenzo binafsi za watumiaji, nyuso za admin, na njia za matumizi zikibaki nje ya ugunduzi.

entries.source: The source links search systems and schools can inspect.
entries.value: Viungo vya chanzo ambavyo mifumo ya utafutaji na shule zinaweza kukagua.

entries.source: The story from quizzes and student communities to free AI learning tools built in public.
entries.value: Hadithi kutoka maswali na jamii za wanafunzi hadi zana za bure za kujifunza kwa AI zilizojengwa hadharani.

entries.source: The story spans quizzes, offline school networks, curriculum ingestion, and public AI learning modes.
entries.value: Hadithi inahusisha maswali, mitandao ya shule nje ya mtandao, uingizaji wa mtaala, na hali za umma za kujifunza kwa AI.

entries.source: The strongest angle is free public AI learning that opens directly in guest mode and keeps learners active through mode-specific teaching rather than generic answer generation.
entries.value: Mwelekeo imara zaidi ni kujifunza kwa AI kwa umma bila malipo, kunakofunguka moja kwa moja katika hali ya mgeni na kuwaweka wanafunzi hai kupitia ufundishaji mahsusi wa hali badala ya uzalishaji wa majibu ya jumla.

entries.source: The wider international buildout connected to the inspir project.
entries.value: Ujenzi mpana wa kimataifa uliounganishwa na mradi wa inspir.

entries.source: The written learning library that supports prompts, study loops, and long-tail discovery.
entries.value: Maktaba ya maandishi ya kujifunza inayounga mkono vidokezo, mizunguko ya kusoma, na ugunduzi wa mkia mrefu.

entries.source: These public files explain what should be indexed, what should not, and where the formal policies live.
entries.value: Faili hizi za umma hueleza kinachopaswa kuorodheshwa, kisichopaswa kuorodheshwa, na mahali sera rasmi zilipo.

entries.source: These safeguards connect product behavior, private boundaries, crawler rules, and school deployment needs into one public explanation.
entries.value: Vizuizi hivi vya usalama huunganisha tabia ya bidhaa, mipaka binafsi, kanuni za vitambazaji, na mahitaji ya usambazaji shuleni kuwa maelezo moja ya umma.

entries.value: Uaminifu

entries.value: Sera ya uaminifu na vitambazaji

entries.source: Trust and safety
entries.value: Uaminifu na usalama

entries.value: Uaminifu na Usalama

entries.source: Trust And Safety | inspir
entries.value: Uaminifu na Usalama | inspir

entries.source: Trust questions for learners, schools, and crawlers.
entries.value: Maswali ya uaminifu kwa wanafunzi, shule, na vitambazaji.

entries.source: Trust safeguard
entries.value: Kinga ya uaminifu

entries.source: Try public guest modes
entries.value: Jaribu hali za umma za wageni

entries.source: Understanding over answers
entries.value: Uelewa kuliko majibu

entries.source: Unlike a generic chatbot, inspir organizes AI around learning modes so learners can start with the kind of help they need: hints, questions, quizzes, active recall, roleplay, debate, or feedback.
entries.value: Tofauti na chatbot ya jumla, inspir hupanga AI kuzunguka hali za kujifunza ili wanafunzi waanze na aina ya msaada wanaohitaji: vidokezo, maswali, majaribio, kukumbuka kwa bidii, uigizaji wa majukumu, mjadala, au mrejesho.

entries.source: Use https://inspirlearning.com for the site, /mission for the mission, /topics for the public learning mode directory, and /chat/learn-anything for the default guest learning experience.
entries.value: Tumia https://inspirlearning.com kwa tovuti, /mission kwa dhamira, /topics kwa saraka ya umma ya hali za kujifunza, na /chat/learn-anything kwa uzoefu chaguo-msingi wa kujifunza kama mgeni.

entries.source: Use this for school, partner, CSR, and education access references.
entries.value: Tumia hili kwa marejeleo ya shule, washirika, CSR, na ufikiaji wa elimu.

entries.source: Use this when citing the long-form guide library, study prompts, and mode-specific articles.
entries.value: Tumia hili unapoinukuu maktaba ya miongozo mirefu, vidokezo vya kusoma, na makala mahsusi kwa hali.

entries.source: Use this when describing the full set of guest-mode learning tools that are meant to be indexed.
entries.value: Tumia hili unapoeleza seti kamili ya zana za kujifunza za hali ya mgeni zinazokusudiwa kuorodheshwa.

entries.source: Use this when introducing inspir as the main product or linking from a directory, profile, or article.
entries.value: Tumia hili unapoitambulisha inspir kama bidhaa kuu au unapounganisha kutoka saraka, wasifu, au makala.

entries.source: Use this when linking readers straight into the live learning experience.
entries.value: Tumia hili unapowaelekeza wasomaji moja kwa moja kwenye uzoefu hai wa kujifunza.

entries.source: Use this when referencing public/private boundaries, crawler policy, and school trust.
entries.value: Tumia hili unaporejelea mipaka ya umma/binafsi, sera ya vitambazaji, na uaminifu wa shule.

entries.value: Gumzo la AI lenye nembo maalum

entries.value: Nani anaweza kutumia ukurasa wa vyombo vya habari?

entries.source: Why does inspir allow AI discovery crawlers?
entries.value: Kwa nini inspir inaruhusu vitambazaji vya ugunduzi wa AI?

entries.source: Why does inspir support school and partner deployments?
entries.value: Kwa nini inspir huunga mkono usambazaji wa shule na washirika?

entries.source: Why is inspir built around modes instead of one chat box?
entries.value: Kwa nini inspir imejengwa kuzunguka hali badala ya kisanduku kimoja cha gumzo?

entries.source: Yes. A school can begin by testing public modes, then move toward a pilot or tailored deployment when the use case, content needs, and funding path are clear.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Shule inaweza kuanza kwa kujaribu hali za umma, kisha kwenda kwenye majaribio au usambazaji maalum wakati matumizi, mahitaji ya maudhui, na njia ya ufadhili viko wazi.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly from canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URLs.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Hali za umma za wageni kama Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, maswali, na flashcards hufunguka moja kwa moja kutoka URL rasmi za /chat/{topicSlug}.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic entrypoints such as /chat/learn-anything and /chat/socratic-instruction are intended to be indexable learning pages.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Njia za umma za kuingia kwenye mada kama /chat/learn-anything na /chat/socratic-instruction zimekusudiwa kuwa kurasa za kujifunza zinazoweza kuorodheshwa.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes let school leaders and teachers try the learning experience before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Hali za umma za wageni huwawezesha viongozi wa shule na walimu kujaribu uzoefu wa kujifunza kabla ya kujadili usambazaji maalum wa shule.
